name: kittentts
description: Install KittenTTS, a local CPU-only text-to-speech service for OpenEnsemble. ~50 MB total install (25 MB model + ONNX runtime + bundled espeak-ng), 8 preset voices (no voice cloning), no GPU, no API key. Targets the low-end-hardware tier — users without a discrete GPU who don't want to pay for a remote TTS API. The same script can be re-run safely; existing venv/model/service are detected and skipped.
